str.authority: Financial Transactions and Reports Analysis Centre of Canada (FINTRAC)
str.notes: Suspicious Transaction Reports (STR) must be filed within 3 business days. Terrorist activity financing reports must be filed immediately. Filed via FINTRAC F2R system under PCMLTFA.

ctr.authority: Financial Transactions and Reports Analysis Centre of Canada (FINTRAC)
ctr.notes: Large Cash Transaction Reports (LCTR) required for physical cash transactions of CAD 10,000 or more. Must be filed within 15 calendar days.
